test-case.name: AsyncTurnIntegrator_ConvertsWorkerFaultToFallbackResult
test-case.output: [TacticalAI] async-start actor=team-0-slot-0 profile=fault snapshot=0f7372ba163e9da2137e6c3bce58926bddda7ff47a2938e8b6e07bf7039c0ea9 decisionId=1 [TacticalAI] async-fault actor=team-0-slot-0 decisionId=1 error=planner failed

test-case.name: AsyncTurnIntegrator_DoesNotCompleteWhileWorkerPlanIsStillRunning
test-case.output: [TacticalAI] async-start actor=team-0-slot-0 profile=running snapshot=0f7372ba163e9da2137e6c3bce58926bddda7ff47a2938e8b6e07bf7039c0ea9 decisionId=1 [TacticalAI] async-complete actor=team-0-slot-0 decisionId=1 [TacticalAI] plan actor=team-0-slot-0 best=Wait score=12 depth=2 fallbackCount=0 opponentResponse=not-covered [TacticalAI] started actor=team-0-slot-0 Wait

test-case.name: AsyncTurnIntegrator_FallsBackWhenCurrentSnapshotHashChangesBeforeConsume
test-case.output: [TacticalAI] async-start actor=team-0-slot-0 profile=stale snapshot=0f7372ba163e9da2137e6c3bce58926bddda7ff47a2938e8b6e07bf7039c0ea9 decisionId=1 [TacticalAI] async-complete actor=team-0-slot-0 decisionId=1 [TacticalAI] plan actor=team-0-slot-0 best=Wait score=12 depth=2 fallbackCount=0 opponentResponse=not-covered [TacticalAI] async-stale actor=team-0-slot-0 decisionId=1 reason=SnapshotHashChanged

test-case.name: TryStartTurn_ReturnsFallback_WhenBridgeReportsNoLegalAction
test-case.output: [TacticalAI] planning actor=team-0-slot-0 profile=Normal [TacticalAI] plan actor=team-0-slot-0 best=Skill skill=BattleCry target=team-1-slot-0 score=42.5 depth=3 fallbackCount=0 opponentResponse=covered

test-case.name: TryStartTurn_ReturnsFallback_WhenPlanIsEmpty

test-case.name: TryStartTurn_ReturnsStarted_WhenBridgeStartsAction
test-case.output: [TacticalAI] planning actor=team-0-slot-0 profile=Normal [TacticalAI] plan actor=team-0-slot-0 best=Move targetHex=2,0 score=42.5 depth=3 fallbackCount=0 opponentResponse=covered [TacticalAI] started actor=team-0-slot-0 Move targetHex=2,0
